TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv_Khalifa_bin_Zayed_Al_Nahyan, title = Khalifa_bin_Zayed_Al_Nahyan, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Seediq]}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/wiki/Khalifa_bin_Zayed_Al_Nahyan} }

S.FORM: = Khalifa bin Zayed Al Nahyan = Mntucing hngkawas 1948 idas jiyax ka Khalifa bin Zayed Al Nahyan ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan United arab emirates ta sayang o kiya ka Khalifa bin Zayed Al Nahyan, pnaah hngkawas 2004 idas 11 jiyax 3 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan. Papak
S.PHON: = kħali*a bin *ajəd al naħjan = mntuʦiŋ ħŋkawas **** idas ɟijax ka kħali*a bin *ajəd al naħjan ga, əmpklaw ka ħija. bukuŋ klwaan unitəd aɾab əmiɾatəs ta sajaŋ o kija ka kħali*a bin *ajəd al naħjan, pnaaħ ħŋkawas **** idas ** ɟijax * pnɾaɟiŋ kmlawa klwaan. papak
S.FORM: = Khalifa bin Zayed Al Nahyan = Mntucing hngkawas 1948 idas jiyax ka Khalifa bin Zayed Al Nahyan ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan United arab emirates ta sayang o kiya ka Khalifa bin Zayed Al Nahyan, pnaah hngkawas 2004 idas 11 jiyax 3 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan. Papak
S.PHON: = kħali*a bin *ajəd al naħjan = mntuʦiŋ ħŋkawas **** idas ɟijax ka kħali*a bin *ajəd al naħjan ga, əmpklaw ka ħija. bukuŋ klwaan unitəd aɾab əmiɾatəs ta sajaŋ o kija ka kħali*a bin *ajəd al naħjan, pnaaħ ħŋkawas **** idas ** ɟijax * pnɾaɟiŋ kmlawa klwaan. papak
